meta.name: claude-code-tools-windows-runner
meta.description: Experimental Windows tool runner profile for Claude Code Bash rewriting; grants CWD access, blocks network, declares deny entries for ~/.claude hook state, and routes confined runs through the Low-IL primary-token broker (windows_low_il_broker) so .NET/PowerShell can start (WRITE_RESTRICTED blocks the CLR; see Phase 60 F-60-UAT-05)
meta.author: nono-project
